examples: The book contrasts modern civilization with the ideal of the noble savage who lived in harmony with nature.
Was it on the train "Harmony" that John met with his girlfriend?
The only way for us to survive is to live in harmony with nature.
Used for state banquets and later for imperial examinations is the Hall of Preserving Harmony.
This harmony is most celebrated in the colonias (suburbs) of Roma, Condesa and Zona Rosa.
